name: Vegetable Cheese Baskets"cestini Di Formaggio Con Verdure
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a non-stick crepe pan over medium heat.
2. Pour in one-quarter of the Grana Padano and let it melt without touching the pan; using a wooden spatula or a long fork, carefully turn the cheese over to cook on the other side. Cook until melted but not browned. The cheese should still be soft.
3. While the cheese is still hot, drape it over the bottom of a glass, pressing hard to form a basket shape. Repeat the procedure with the remaining Grana Padano; you will have a total of 4 cheese disks.
4. Finely dice the asparagus and sauté in the same pan with the butter for 5 minutes; season with salt and divide among the 4 cheese baskets.
5. Sprinkle each basket with the minced hard-boiled eggs and place on a platter.
6. Garnish with the radish and serve while the asparagus is still warm.
263 calories per serving
You can use Parmigiano Reggiano or Montasio cheese instead of Grana Padano. This recipe is inspired by the frico of Friuli Venezia Giulia, which is made with aged Montasio cheese.
